content.text: Can we add a clickable next step even after a purely explanatory answer?

payload.name: request_user_input
payload.arguments: {"questions":[{"header":"Pick a design lane","question":"Which direction should we define first for explanatory-response follow-ups?","options":[{"label":"Refine decision rules first","description":"Start with the criteria for when explanatory closeouts should trigger a follow-up question."},{"label":"Add sample fixture","description":"Add a synthetic transcript where a follow-up question should appear after the explanation."},{"label":"Tighten duplicate prevention","description":"Improve the recent-history rules so the same follow-up question does not repeat."}]}]}

content.text: A short next-step follow-up question usually works well after an explanatory response.
